stat_block.text: These glowing shields are crafted to ensure that the abysium used is safely contained within a durable outer shell. If the shield breaks, however, the toxic metal becomes exposed. When you use the Shield Block reaction against an adjacent creature's melee Strike, if the shield breaks, the creature is exposed to the abysium and is sickened 1 for a standard-grade shield or sickened 2 for a high-grade shield.

traits.name: Rare
traits.text: This rarity indicates that a rules element is very difficult to find in the game world. A rare feat, spell, item or the like is available to players only if the GM decides to include it in the game, typically through discovery during play. Creatures with this trait are rare. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creatures is increased by 5.

variants.name: Abysium Buckler (Standard-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 4, HP 16, and BT 8.

variants.name: Abysium Shield (Standard-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 6, HP 24, and BT 12.

variants.name: Abysium Buckler (High-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 7, HP 28, and BT 14.

variants.name: Abysium Shield (High-Grade)
variants.text: The shield has Hardness 10, HP 40, and BT 20.
